app_summary: The app is a Reddit client named RedReader, which allows users to browse and interact with Reddit content. It includes features such as user agreement acceptance, subreddit browsing, login functionality, and detailed settings for customization.

core_workflows.description: Step 1: The user opens the app and sees the User Agreement screen (State 0) which displays the RedReader terms. Step 2: The user taps the 'Accept' button at the bottom of the agreement dialog, navigating to the Reddit User Agreement confirmation (State 10). Step 3: The user taps 'I Agree' to confirm acceptance, which loads the Front Page (State 11) showing a list of subscribed subreddits like 'art', 'askreddit', and 'aww'.
core_workflows.purpose: First-time user onboarding flow that gates access behind agreement acceptance.

core_workflows.description: Step 1: The user opens the app and sees the User Agreement screen (State 0). Step 2: The user taps the 'Accept' button, navigating to the Reddit User Agreement confirmation (State 10). Step 3: The user taps 'I Agree', which loads the Front Page (State 9). Step 4: The user taps the 'Reddit Accounts' option in the main menu, navigating to the Reddit Accounts screen (State 13).
core_workflows.purpose: Onboarding flow that leads to account management after agreement acceptance.

core_workflows.path: State 0 -> State 10 -> State 9 -> State 15 -> State 16 -> State 7
core_workflows.description: Step 1: The user opens the app and sees the User Agreement screen (State 0). Step 2: The user taps the 'Accept' button, navigating to the Reddit User Agreement confirmation (State 10). Step 3: The user taps 'I Agree', which loads the Front Page (State 9). Step 4: The user taps the 'Pinned Subreddits' option, navigating to the Pinned Subreddits screen (State 15). Step 5: The user taps the 'Back' button, returning to the main menu (State 16). Step 6: The user taps the 'Front Page' option, navigating to the main menu (State 7).
core_workflows.purpose: Onboarding flow that allows users to explore pinned subreddits and return to the main menu.

core_workflows.path: State 0 -> State 10 -> State 9 -> State 13 -> State 14 -> State 13
core_workflows.description: Step 1: The user opens the app and sees the User Agreement screen (State 0). Step 2: The user taps the 'Accept' button, navigating to the Reddit User Agreement confirmation (State 10). Step 3: The user taps 'I Agree', which loads the Front Page (State 9). Step 4: The user taps the 'Reddit Accounts' option in the main menu, navigating to the Reddit Accounts screen (State 13). Step 5: The user taps the 'Add Reddit Account' option, navigating to the Add Reddit Account screen (State 14). Step 6: The user taps the 'Back' button, returning to the Reddit Accounts screen (State 13).
core_workflows.purpose: Onboarding flow that allows users to manage their Reddit accounts.
